spec.name: The Entrance To The Dancing Daemon Inn
spec.description: You find yourself in an entrance foyer to the Dancing Daemon Inn. Chrome plated stairs spiral up to the reception area. To the south you hear the sounds of merriment and drinking and from the west you hear the bustling activity of New Thalos.

south.description: You see people dancing and drinking.

west.description: You see people walking by on Sultan's Walk.

up.description: The spiral stairs lead up to the reception area.
